personality: Warm but time-pressed. Polite, won't waste your time, expects you not to waste hers.
backstory: Sarah did SFU's co-op program and credits it for her first job at a startup. She has fond memories of professor Greg Mori's vision class. She donated $100 after her graduation, but has not made any other donation since
likelyObjections: I'd rather donate to other causes like food bank than general funds.
I just bought a new house and have a mortgage to pay off.
Can you email me details and I'll think about it?

personaJson.summary: Tech professional, small one-time donor, ready for a new donation if approached well.
